choices.text: Metal plate (Steelmaster/Cryptosteel) offline + geographic redundancy + test recovery on wiped device before scaling deposits. Never digital photo, email, cloud — phishing/breach risk.
Phishing > lost keys > exchange hacks > software bugs >>> 51% > quantum. Day-to-day threats are scams + key loss. Focus security on real-world common attacks, not theoretical protocol attacks.

questions.explanation: Phishing + key loss dominant; protocol attacks rare.

choices.text: NFT-like assets via inscription in Taproot witness; sat identified via Ordinal theory. Jan 2023; no protocol change. Stored on-chain permanently. Pushed fees up; controversial.
Runes (April 2024): UTXO-based, uses OP_RETURN, more efficient than BRC-20. Designed to replace BRC-20 (JSON inscription tokens). Both speculative; non-native; off-chain indexer-dependent.

Don't reuse addresses + run own node (over Tor) + separate wallets per purpose + consider CoinJoin (Wasabi/JoinMarket) before large movements + hold long-term off exchange. Custodial mixers risky post-sanction.
